name: DialogRef
description:
Reference to a dialog component
It can be injected into the content component through the constructor.
For a template, it is declared as part of the implicit context, see examples.

parameters.name: isHidden
parameters.description: Value used to determine if dialog window should be hidden or visible.

methods.name: loading
methods.description: Displays the dialog in loading state.

parameters.name: loadingData
parameters.description: Value used to determine if dialog window should be displayed in loading state.

methods.name: toggleFullScreen
methods.description: Toggles full-screen mode of the Dialog.

methods.name: close
methods.description:
Closes the dialog normally and returns a result value.
Updates signal state and emits to observables for backward compatibility.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Optional result value to return to the caller

methods.name: dismiss
methods.description:
Dismisses the dialog without a result, typically due to user cancellation.
Updates signal state and emits error to observables for backward compatibility.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Optional reason for dismissal (ESC key, backdrop click, etc.)

methods.name: loaded
methods.description:
Marks the dialog as loaded and initialized.
Called internally after the dialog view has been created and rendered.
Updates signal state and emits to observables for backward compatibility.
